backstory.original: Jarlaxle is a flamboyant, swashbuckling drow who leads Bregan D'aerthe, a band of drow outcasts and renegades from Menzoberranzan. Jarlaxle secretly controls the northern city of Luskan from the shadows by manipulating the five High Captains who rule the city.
backstory.display: 贾拉索是个浮夸的、爱耍花招的卓尔精灵，他领导着卓尔无赖佣兵公会，这是一支来自魔索布莱城的卓尔精灵弃儿和叛徒所组成的公会。贾拉索通过操纵统治这座城市的五位高级队长，从暗处秘密控制了北部城市路斯坎。

description.original: Jarlaxle attacks the furthest enemy. If it dies, he keeps on attacking, halving his damage each time.
description.display: 贾拉索攻击距离最远的敌人。如果敌人死亡，他还会继续攻击其他敌人，但每次后续攻击伤害减半。

description.original: Jarlaxle summons the Bregan D'aerthe to attack enemies in the formation from afar with cannon fire.
description.display: 贾拉索召唤卓尔无赖佣兵公会，用火炮从远处攻击阵型中的敌人。

longDescription.original: Jarlaxle summons the Bregan D'aerthe to attack enemies in the formation from afar with cannon fire.
longDescription.display: 贾拉索召唤卓尔无赖佣兵公会，用火炮从远处攻击阵型中的敌人。

description.desc: Increases gold find by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Drow or Rogue Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位卓尔精灵或游荡者勇士，即提升金币获得量 $(not_buffed amount)%

tipText.original: Jarlaxle increases your gold find based on the number of Drow or Rogue Champions in your formation.
tipText.display: 贾拉索根据阵型中的卓尔精灵或游荡者勇士的数量来提高金币寻获。

description.desc: Increases the damage of $source by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Good or Neutral champion next to them
$source每与一位善良或中立阵营的勇士相邻，即提升 $(not_buffed amount)% 伤害

tipText.original: Jarlaxle increases his own damage when he is adjacent to Good or Neutral Champions.
tipText.display: 与善良或中立勇士相邻时，贾拉索使自身伤害提高。

specializationDescription.original: Jarlaxle works from the shadows, further manipulating Good and Neutral allies to his own ends.
specializationDescription.display: 贾拉索暗中行事，进一步操纵善良与中立盟友以达成自己的目的。

specializationName.display: 卓尔无赖佣兵公会的领袖

specializationDescription.original: Jarlaxle leads a crew of shady pirates, further increasing the gold find of Master of Piracy.
specializationDescription.display: 贾拉索带领一群鬼祟的海盗，进一步提高海盗大师的金币寻获。

description.desc: Increases the damage of $source by $amount% for each $(describe_rarity rarity) item equipped by other Champions in the formation
阵型中每有一名装备了$(describe_rarity rarity)的其他勇士，即为$source提升 $amount% 伤害

description.original: I don't usually partake in tavern dalliances, honestly.
description.display: 老实说，在酒馆里我一般不管闲事。

description.original: Get close and you'll feel my blade!
description.display: 靠近一点，你就能感受到我的利刃！

description.original: Keep your friends close, but keep your coin pouch closer.
description.display: 让朋友离你近一点，但让钱袋离你更近一点。

description.original: How fortunate that we caught you on your way to the bank.
description.display: 多走运啊，我们正好在你去银行的路上抓住了你。

description.original: Finally I'll be able to replace all the boots I've ruined.
description.display: 我终于能换掉所有被我毁掉的靴子了。

description.original: No one survives in Menzoberranzan unless they can act the part.
description.display: 没人能在魔索布莱城生存下来，除非他们能演好自己的角色。

description.original: Strike while the iron is hot, or the baddie is monologuing.
description.display: 做事该趁热打铁，否则坏人会得逞。

description.original: You thought my hobby was, what? Knitting?
description.display: 你认为我的爱好是什么？织毛衣？

description.original: Look at those gaps in your armor. Perfect for my daggers.
description.display: 瞧瞧你盔甲上的缺口。非常适合插入我的匕首。

description.original: Is attacking from the shadows honorable? Of course not! Who cares?
description.display: 暗中发动攻击光荣吗？当然不！但是谁在乎？

description.original: These looks could kill -- and they have.
description.display: 它们看起来非常致命--事实也的确如此。

description.original: Sometimes the most devastating attacks are the ones they see coming.
description.display: 杀伤力最强的攻击有时只能目睹而无法躲避。

description.original: No cleric can help you now.
description.display: 现在没有牧师能帮你了。

description.original: It's going to take a lot more than that to defeat me!
description.display: 只靠这点本事可无法击败我！

character_sheet_details.backstory: Jarlaxle is a flamboyant, swashbuckling drow who leads Bregan D'aerthe, a band of drow outcasts and renegades from Menzoberranzan. Jarlaxle secretly controls the northern city of Luskan from the shadows by manipulating the five High Captains who rule the city.
